column1: # A finding is raised when the detected version is BELOW safeVersion.
# Curated starter set — extend as needed (this is not the full Retire.js DB).

column4: jQuery < 3.5.0 is affected by XSS via htmlPrefilter (CVE-2020-11022, CVE-2020-11023).
jQuery UI < 1.13.2: XSS in datepicker/dialog/tooltip (CVE-2021-41182/41183/41184, CVE-2022-31160).
AngularJS 1.x is End-of-Life and unpatched; multiple XSS and sandbox-escape issues. Migrate to Angular 2+.
Bootstrap < 4.3.1 (and 3.x < 3.4.1): XSS via data-* attributes (CVE-2019-8331, CVE-2018-14041).
lodash < 4.17.21: prototype pollution and ReDoS (CVE-2020-8203, CVE-2021-23337, CVE-2019-10744).
moment < 2.29.4: ReDoS and path traversal (CVE-2022-24785, CVE-2022-31129). Project is in maintenance mode.
Handlebars < 4.7.7: prototype pollution leading to RCE (CVE-2019-19919, CVE-2021-23369/23383).
DOMPurify < 3.0.9: several mutation-XSS sanitizer bypasses reported; keep up to date.
angular-sanitize 1.x is EOL alongside AngularJS; unpatched XSS bypasses.
underscore < 1.12.1: arbitrary code execution via template (CVE-2021-23358).
axios < 1.6.0: CSRF token leakage / SSRF and ReDoS issues (CVE-2023-45857, CVE-2021-3749).
jquery-validation < 1.19.5: ReDoS in URL/credit-card validators (CVE-2021-43306, CVE-2022-31147).
